examples: Arugula has been heralded as an arousal aid since the first century.
Toss arugula with fennel, add grapefruit and avocado, and gently toss.
And what about that innocent-looking arugula: Will pesticide residue cause cancer, or do the leaves themselves harbor E. coli?
Recently, a lunch of smoked cauliflower soup and arugula-and-spring-fennel salad was served within five minutes of ordering.
The arugula must be selected and handled with care, so that not a single leaf is wilted or bruised.
